name: Content Creator — USD Foreign Income Conversion and Tech CCA
description: Complete Julian Rossi's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. He is an Ontario resident working as a part-time barista and digital content creator. Using the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\, convert USD Google AdSense income to CAD using the provided Bank of Canada average exchange rate, categorize tech equipment into CCA classes (Class 50 and Class 8), and calculate business-use-of-home expenses. Save the completed return as 'julian_rossi.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income)
metadata.key_complexity: Foreign currency conversion for T2125 income; differentiating CCA classes for tech equipment (Class 50 for PC vs Class 8 for Camera); business-use-of-home expenses
